places.name: Cabaret Voltaire: the Dada House
places.description: One hundred years ago this small house in downtown Zürich became the birthplace of the Dada movement.

places.name: Oepfelchammer
places.description: A 200-year-old tavern challenges guests to finish a glass of wine while hanging from a ceiling beam.

places.name: MFO Park
places.description: Vines grow up the metal bars in this public park created from an old machine factory.

places.name: Moulagenmuseum
places.description: Museum dedicated to wax representations of disfiguring diseases.

places.name: Sukkulenten-Sammlung Zürich
places.description: See the rare bloom of the "Queen of the Night" cactus at one of the world's largest succulent collections.

places.name: Haus Hiltl
places.description: Featuring a meatless buffet fit for kings, this family-owned Zurich eatery is considered the oldest vegetarian restaurant in the West.

places.name: Schrödinger's Cat
places.description: Hidden in the garden of physicist Erwin Schrödinger's house is a life-size figure of a cat from his famous thought experiment.

places.name: Mühlerama Museum
places.description: Grind your own flour to bake your own bread at a 100-year-old mill.
